title: desmodium rotundifolium
intro: Desmodium rotundifolium, also known as Round-leaf tick trefoil or Round-leaf tick clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Desmodium rotundifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
